Name: set_department_manager
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."set_department_manager"("p_user_id" := $1, "p_department_id" := $2, "session" := $3) AS "_fn_set_department_manager" WHERE "_fn_set_department_manager"."department_id" = ANY($4::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."department_id" AS "department_id", "_root.base"."user_id" AS "user_id", "_root.base"."role" AS "role") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base"
